description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular layout. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows distributed asymmetrically along the walls, allowing for ample natural light. A spacious wooden deck surrounds a rectangular swimming pool, which is fenced for safety and features a lounge chair. The front of the bungalow includes a wide driveway and a small patch of green lawn, leading up to the main entrance. The structure appears to be constructed primarily from concrete and glass, with some wooden elements on the deck and pool area. The overall design is open and contemporary, suitable for an urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced pool on a wooden deck. Features include a wide driveway, green lawn, and contemporary architectural details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wide driveway, and green lawn leading up to the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the driveway, and the full extent of the pool area.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the fenced swimming pool, wooden deck, and back facade with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the pool, deck, and the rear and side walls of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large windows distributed along all facades
